nodes.name: Steam Power
nodes.desc: Steam engines drive the first mills and locomotives. Available from the start.

nodes.name: Industrial Steel
nodes.desc: Bessemer converters yield structural steel at scale. Rail can be laid five years early.

nodes.name: Combustion Engine
nodes.desc: Petrol engines replace draft animals in industry and freight.

nodes.name: Electrical Grid
nodes.desc: Centralized generation powers factories and homes. Research rate +25%.

nodes.name: Mass Production
nodes.desc: Assembly lines cut the cost of everything from nails to rifles. Build costs −15%.

nodes.name: Asphalt Paving
nodes.desc: Bitumen coats the region's arteries. Highways unlock five years early.

nodes.name: The Atomic Age
nodes.desc: The atom is split. This era marker unlocks advanced research in the next tier.

nodes.name: Computing
nodes.desc: Mainframes shrink toward the microchip. Research rate +25%.

nodes.name: Automated Freight
nodes.desc: Self-routing depots and driverless haulers run the network. Route maintenance −40%.

nodes.name: Maglev Trains
nodes.desc: Superconducting guideways float freight at airline speed. Maglev lines can be laid five years early.

nodes.name: Land Survey
nodes.desc: Theodolite teams chart the hinterland, letting the realm purchase explored parcels that don't yet touch its borders.

nodes.name: Road Building
nodes.desc: Graded trunk roads reach new ground cheaply — every parcel acquisition costs 20% less.

nodes.name: Cartography
nodes.desc: Precise mapping surveys the wider frontier, revealing the biomes of cells two rings out from each new holding.

nodes.name: Common Law
nodes.desc: Precedent and custom give settlers predictable rights. Available from the start.

nodes.name: Public Education
nodes.desc: A schoolhouse in every settlement doubles literacy. Research rate +50%.

nodes.name: Free Press
nodes.desc: Newspapers carry opinion faster than officials can manage.

nodes.name: Labor Standards
nodes.desc: Regulated hours and safety rules. Grievance builds 30% more slowly.

nodes.name: Income Tax
nodes.desc: Progressive levies on wages, not just trade. Treasury receives +3% of GDP monthly.

nodes.name: Universal Suffrage
nodes.desc: All adults vote; factions must win opinion, not just interests. Satisfaction +3.

nodes.name: Statecraft
nodes.desc: The science of governing a multi-state nation. Unlocks the Constitutional Convention — the path to Proclamation.

nodes.name: Renewable Energy
nodes.desc: Wind, water, and sun displace the coal seam. National emissions ×0.6 — and rivals copy the proven designs (world emissions −20%).

nodes.name: Fusion Power
nodes.desc: A star in a bottle, at last. National emissions ×0.15, and the design diffuses worldwide (world emissions −50%).

nodes.name: Environmentalism
nodes.desc: Society notices the smoke. Unlocks the Carbon Levy act and Climate Accord diplomacy.

nodes.name: Stratospheric Aerosols
nodes.desc: Reflective particles injected high above the clouds arrest warming within two years — but the unilateral act is a diplomacy bomb. Unlocks the one-time Deploy action.

nodes.name: Artificial Intelligence
nodes.desc: Machine minds read every ledger and lab notebook at once. Research rate +25%.

nodes.name: Robotics
nodes.desc: Automated plants and self-maintaining depots run the network. Route maintenance −30% on top of automated freight.

nodes.name: Carbon Capture
nodes.desc: Direct-air scrubbers pull the century's soot back out of the sky. National emissions ×0.4, and the proven plants diffuse worldwide (world emissions −30%).

nodes.name: Advanced Materials
nodes.desc: Graphene, aerogels, and printed alloys. An era marker that opens the final tier of construction and orbital industry.

nodes.name: Orbital Industry
nodes.desc: Factories in vacuum and power beamed from orbit — the post-scarcity capstone of the technological century.

nodes.name: Welfare State
nodes.desc: Pensions, healthcare, and a floor under every citizen. Grievance builds 20% more slowly on top of Labor Standards.

nodes.name: Participatory Democracy
nodes.desc: Citizens' assemblies and live referenda fold the public straight into governing. Satisfaction +3.

nodes.name: World Federation
nodes.desc: Shared institutions bind former rivals into one project — the civic capstone of a planet that chose cooperation.
